Resolution will be determined using the official Pyth Network price data for the relevant Brent Crude asset. If the specified feed is unavailable or ceases to update before the resolution time, the market will resolve based on the final available price or, if necessary, via a consensus of major financial data providers reporting Brent Crude futures prices for the corresponding settlement period.

Background

Brent Crude oil futures are traded on the Intercontinental Exchange (ICE). A "Q6" contract refers to a specific quarterly futures contract. Traders monitor these prices as indicators of global market sentiment, supply-demand balances, and geopolitical risk factors affecting energy markets.
